_comment: Domain suffix blocklist consulted by openclaw-browser before any agent-driven navigation. Suffix-match: 'bankofamerica.com' blocks 'www.bankofamerica.com' and 'login.bankofamerica.com' alike. Empty list = no policy (operator's risk). Edit and `docker compose restart openclaw-browser` to apply.
_allow_comment: Future use: a per-host rate-limit override or per-host stealth-mode flag map. Current build ignores this list; edits here are forward-compatible.
